'''kang챦fn챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabble|grabble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabble|grabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| kang챦fn챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Number !! Form
|-
| [[paucal]] || [[word:kang챦fn챦f|kang챦fn챦f]]
|-
| [[plentiful]] || [[word:kang챦fng챦fn챦f|kang챦fng챦fn챦f]]
|}

''2 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! Form
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kang챦fn챦f|kang챦fn챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kang챦fn챦f챦f챦f|kang챦fn챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kang챦fn챦f챦fn|kang챦fn챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
